name: Mutton Dry Curry
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Lamb, cut into bite-size chunks
recipeInstructions:
Not all curries have a lot of sauce. This one, from the book "A Kitchen Symphony," compiled by the Singapore Symphony Orchestra Ladies League, is a dry curry from South India.
1. Grind onions, garlic, ginger root, cloves, cinnamon, and whole cardamom pods together in a food processor.
2. Add salt to taste and ¼ cup water, then add curry powder and chili powder. Process again.
3. Rub the paste into lamb chunks.
4. Heat ghee in a skillet. Add lamb and fry until oil rises to the surface.
5. Add curry leaves and simmer for 1 ½ hours, adding more water if the curry becomes too dry. The mixture should not be soupy.
6. At serving time, squeeze lime juice over the curry.
